Call ID: EXT-009
Type: external
Date: 2026-02-02
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Naomi (account manager); Marcus (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Naomi): Hi Marcus, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Marcus): The reporting is powerful but the learning curve is steep.
AM (Naomi): That's really useful — I'll get this to product with your context.
Customer (Marcus): The team is generally positive, but there are gaps.
AM (Naomi): Let me connect you with our product team for a feedback session.
Customer (Marcus): Good conversation — send me that summary and we'll align internally.
AM (Naomi): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
